name_en: Original FENDI hot classic Baguette, made of canvas with high-end craftsmanship. The whole bag features double FF 3D embroidery with an unbeatable texture. Comes with a detachable shoulder strap with Baguette text. The wide shoulder strap design and flap offer strong practicality. The small details everywhere are truly loveable~~size28/6.5/13.5cm 110F
